configuration.database_url: environment variable or test fixture config

data_flow.description: Read approved landing/source files into raw parsed rows.
Validate raw rows and persist accepted/rejected rows with lineage.

deferred_items.reason: Reserved for goal loop or explicit environment authority.

forbidden_libraries.name: hard-coded cloud SDK clients
forbidden_libraries.reason: Cloud mutation is outside build-auto authority

required_libraries.allowed_usage: source file parsing and tabular validation
required_libraries.name: pandas
required_libraries.reason: Parse CSV/XLSX source fixtures during MVP ingestion

required_libraries.name: sqlalchemy
required_libraries.reason: Abstract local Postgres writes with future cloud runtime portability

required_libraries.name: pydantic
required_libraries.reason: Validate parsed records and configuration objects

implementation_rules: Do not hard-code absolute local paths.
Every accepted bronze row must retain source_file_id and source_row_number.
Every rejected row must retain source lineage and a reason code.
Use deterministic idempotency keys; ingestion timestamp is not a business key.
Do not execute Azure or Databricks jobs in build-auto.

module_design.src/ingestion/lineage: source row identifiers and idempotency keys

observability.logging: batch id, source file, accepted/rejected counts

risks.mitigation: Keep source contracts in project-pack context and validate with local E2E fixtures.
risks.risk: Local fixtures may diverge from future production APIs

technical_decisions.decision: Use a modular Python package instead of notebook-first implementation
technical_decisions.rationale: Reusable across local execution and future Azure/Databricks deployment.

cloud_e2e: deferred to goal-auto or explicit environment authority
local_e2e: fixture landing folder to validated bronze/rejection outputs
